evidence: I liked that this particular movie was not only action-packed but it was actually VERY dramatic
this movie is very long, very dramatic, and monotonous
the plot has a really surprising turn of events and is very engaging
the storyline is stable and somewhat linear with few climatic points
the movie is long, but I didn't get bored for a second
Kate Winslet is unbeatable in her acting talent
the actors - Tom Hanks in the first place - act very professionally
the soundtrack is a professional, classy, stylish, and a very moving piece of music
cameramen did a really good job - very realistic scenes of both war and peace
it makes you think and reconsider your life values
despite deepest tragedies, the movie is somewhat life-affirming

summary: The user has a strong preference for dramatic and action-packed films, appreciating high-quality production and exceptional acting. They value emotional depth and sensory experiences in storytelling, while showing mixed feelings towards narrative complexity and pacing.
